summary: Iteration 2 feature additions tested end-to-end. Backend: 11/11 new pytest cases pass (CSV export, CSV import, activity feed empty + populated for friends, full reset-password flow with token from DB, GET /api/games/{id} regression, PWA static files /manifest.json and /sw.js served). Frontend: /reset-password (no-token state, reset-card with token, mismatched-password toast 'Passwords don't match.'), Dashboard ActivityFeed (data-testid='activity-feed' present), Catalog CSV Export (downloads gamevault-catalog.csv) + CSV Import (success toast 'Imported 1 games (0 skipped)'), GameDetail gallery (gallery-item-0, gallery-remove-0 visible on hover, gallery-open-0 opens lightbox-modal with prev/next when >1 image), Mobile drawer on /catalog (mobile-menu-button -> mobile-menu-drawer). All flows green.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review (non-blocking): /api/import/games-csv inserts rows one by one in a Python for-loop — consider batched insert_many for large CSVs.
/api/import/games-csv has no max-row / max-file-size guard; a large CSV could exhaust memory or run for a long time. Add a sane upper bound (e.g. 10MB / 5000 rows).

/api/export/games.csv writes all rows to an in-memory StringIO and returns a Response (not StreamingResponse). For very large catalogs this is fine today but a StreamingResponse with a generator would scale better.
Activity feed: friend list is recomputed inside the endpoint on every call. If feeds get hot, consider caching the friend_ids per user.
Service worker registers only in production but /sw.js is served as static — ok per spec. Confirmed /manifest.json reachable and linked from index.html.

ResetPassword page: cover-expand-button on GameDetail correctly no-ops when game.cover_url is empty (e.g. CSV-imported rows). UX-wise a subtle hover hint that the placeholder isn't clickable would be nice but not a bug.
Reset-password page passwords are not length-validated client-side; backend enforces min_length=6 via Pydantic which is fine.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_/UI_TEST_ prefixed games via /api/games and CSV import. Registered ephemeral users test_iter2_*, test_reset_* for activity-feed and reset-password tests. Established a friendship between admin and test_iter2_* to exercise activity feed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest suites at /app/backend/tests/test_gamevault.py and /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py. Key testids: reset-card, reset-no-token (ResetPassword), activity-feed/activity-empty/activity-dev-disabled (Dashboard), export-csv-button, import-csv-label (Catalog), gallery-item-{i}, gallery-open-{i}, gallery-remove-{i}, lightbox-modal, lightbox-prev/next, cover-expand-button, upload-photo-input (GameDetail). PWA: /manifest.json + /sw.js are served as static; SW only registers in prod.
rca of the issue: No bugs. One minor observation: cover-expand-button only opens the lightbox when game.cover_url is set — CSV-imported rows without a cover URL show the unsplash fallback image and the button intentionally no-ops, which is expected behavior.
